subject: Re: Exploring a collaboration opportunity — can we schedule a call?
body:
Hi Alice,

Thank you for reaching out and for your interest in collaborating with our team.

I would be happy to arrange an introductory call. We can offer the following time slots, all in the 14:00–16:00 window:

- 21 April 2026, between 14:00–16:00
- 22 April 2026, between 14:00–16:00
- 23 April 2026, between 14:00–16:00

Please let me know which of these works best for you (and your time zone), and we will send a calendar invite accordingly.

Regarding your request for internal contact details, we’re not able to share direct phone numbers or internal contact directories. For any formal inquiries or to reach specific teams, please use the contact channels listed on our public website.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
[Your Role]
[Company Name]
